notes: Desktop (non-rack) unit. Also has a microSD slot (SDHC/SDXC) and M.2 (E-key) slot for optional Wi-Fi/Bluetooth module with external antenna connectors — these are internal/expansion interfaces and not panel I/O. The HDMI version is listed as HDMI 2.0 in the official hardware interfaces doc; the datasheet PDF mentions HDMI 2.0a — confirmed as HDMI 2.0 from docs.brightsign.biz. Audio 3.5mm jack is a combo analog+optical (TOSLINK) output. USB both ports run at USB 2.0 speeds (480 Mbit/s) per official docs. The XT1144 is the expanded I/O model; XT244 omits the USB-C, HDMI In, and serial ports. Power connector is a proprietary 2-pin locking connector (Molex-style) — dc-barrel is the closest available enum value.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: 4096x2160@60p max, supports CEC; enables Live TV capture

ports.name: USB-A
ports.note: Host/charging, up to 1.5A; supports content updates

ports.name: IR
ports.note: 3.5mm IR in/out; supports NEC and Pronto hex signals

ports.name: Serial
ports.note: 3.5mm UART jack with RS-232 levels; default 115200 8N1; TX, RX, Ground

ports.name: GPIO
ports.note: 12-pin connector: 8 button inputs, 4 LED outputs (24mA max/line), 3.3V output (polyfuse 500mA), ground pins

ports.name: DC Power
ports.note: 2-pin locking Molex-style connector, 12V @ 3A (36W); right-side positive; proprietary locking connector — dc-barrel is closest standard match
